colors.rules: Avoid generic SaaS flat colors. Use Deep Navy (#0D4C73) to create strong structural contrast for footers and heavy CTA sections. Keep the body crisp and light on #F8FAFB.

visual_enhancers.texture: Implement a subtle grain overlay on solid Navy sections to prevent digital flatness.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections to convey premium B2B authority. Gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.

grids.bento_marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with asymmetric spans (e.g. col-span-8 and col-span-4).
grids.high_density: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 for Services and Labour Laws cards.

Home.hero: Asymmetric layout. Left side massive Chivo heading with tight tracking, right side floating image + animated stats overlay.
Home.services: Bento grid overview of services with clear hover states and Phosphor icons.
Home.clients: react-fast-marquee with grayscale client logos (opacity-50 hover:opacity-100 transition).
Home.testimonials: Shadcn Carousel with elegant overlapping quote cards.

AboutUs.mission_vision: Overlapping Neumorphic or Swiss grid structure cards.
AboutUs.timeline: Vertical staggered timeline with glowing accent nodes (#00D4AA).
AboutUs.team: Image cards with deep navy gradients on hover revealing titles.

LabourLaws.content: Shadcn Tabs or Accordion for the 4 labour codes. Must feel highly educational, clean, and legible. High density grid.

Services.layout: Alternating left-right image/text sections for 6 detailed services, large numbering (01, 02).

Gallery.layout: Responsive masonry or irregular CSS grid for 12 images.

Clients.layout: Grid of logos + embedded testimonials + animated stats counter.

Blog.layout: Grid of 6 blog cards. Edge-to-edge image, crisp overline label, bold title, excerpt.

Contact.layout: Contact info bento cards, embedded Google Map iframe, working hours. NO traditional form (redirect logic to WhatsApp).

Global.whatsapp_fab: Fixed floating WhatsApp button bottom-right with a pulse animation pointing to +91 7016868061.
Global.navigation: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism effect (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-2xl).

motion.scroll: Use Lenis (or similar) for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.entrances: Framer Motion staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) for lists and grids.
motion.interactions: Hover states must slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Buttons must have a slight scale effect on click.

media.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or regular weight for high-end B2B look)

image_urls.description: Business meeting with people around a conference table.
Four professionals in a modern office meeting space.
Diverse team collaborating in a modern office setting with laptops and documents.
Three people collaborate around a table with laptops.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build an 8-page React application using react-router-dom.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo' or 'DM Sans' with tight tracking to convey strong B2B authority.
Use Phosphor icons for a sophisticated corporate look instead of generic Lucide defaults.
Implement a fixed floating WhatsApp CTA button at the bottom right that links to 'https://wa.me/917016868061'. Do not build a backend contact form.
Strictly follow the color palette: Primary #00AEEF, Secondary #0D4C73, Accent #00D4AA, Base #F8FAFB.
Use deep navy (#0D4C73) for high-contrast dark sections (like the footer, big CTA banners) and use white or #00AEEF for text/buttons over it.
Implement 'Crystal Glass' effect for the sticky navigation header.
Use framer-motion for page transitions and staggering card entrances on scroll.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for elements with content underneath (like dropdowns).
Avoid typical generic corporate layouts; use overlapping bento boxes, asymmetric grid columns, and generous padding (py-24).
Embed a real Google Maps iframe on the Contact page.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
DO NOT apply universal transition like 'transition: all'. It breaks transforms.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Use pill-shaped or sharp modern buttons with interaction animations.
Add hover states, transitions, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Components must use named exports, Pages must use default exports.
Use 'sonner' for toasts if notifications are needed.
Prioritize Shadcn UI for standard components but heavily customize them to fit the B2B 'Swiss Brutalist/Corporate Tech' theme.
